description: A junior designer has completed a new drawing. A senior designer must check it to ensure it complies with the company's drafting standards.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the new drawing and the company's official drafting standard document.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls up both documents for comparison.

nodes.task_description: Review the drawing for compliance with standards for layering, text styles, and dimensioning.

expected_outcome.expected: The senior designer finds that the layering is incorrect.

nodes.task_description: Return the drawing to the junior designer with comments on what needs to be corrected.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent rejects the drawing in the workflow, providing specific feedback for correction.
